messages.content:
Translate to Japanese (include romanization)

"Hey there, champ!"
"やあ、チャンプ！" (Yā, chanpu!)

Translate to Japanese (include romanization)

"GRAND DAD ASSUMES HIS TRUE FORM"
グランド・ダッドが本当の姿を現す (Gurando daddo ga hontō no sugata o arawasu)

Translate to Japanese (include romanization)

"Come back here!"
ここに戻ってきて！ (Koko ni modotte kite!)

Translate to Japanese (include romanization)

"You are rusticated!"
"あなたは退学です！" (Anata wa taigaku desu!)

Translate to English

"Anima Messorem"
"Soul Reaper"

Translate to Japanese (include romanization)

"Another Princess is in Our Castle"
"別のプリンセスが私たちの城にいます" (Betsu no purinsesu ga watashitachi no shiro ni imasu)

Translate to Japanese (include romanization)

"A whole generation of children are gonna think that execution files are evil now."
"今後の世代の子どもたちは、実行ファイルが悪いものだと思うようになるだろう。" (Kongo no sedai no kodomotachi wa, jikkō fairu ga warui mono da to omou yō ni naru darou.)

Translate to Japanese (include romanization)

"Fairy Princess"
フェアリープリンセス (Fearī purinsesu)

Translate to Japanese (include romanization)

"PRESS B TO SKIP"
Bを押してスキップ (B o oshite sukippu)

Translate to Japanese (include romanization)

"Puffin Employment Management Record."
パフィン雇用管理記録 (Pafin koyō kanri kiroku)

Translate to Japanese (include romanization)

"Another place, another time."
別の場所、別の時。 (Betsu no basho, betsu no toki.)

Translate to Japanese (include romanization)

"ShrimpHub"
ShrimpHubの直訳は存在しないため、この単語をそのままカタカナで表記すると「シュリンプハブ」(Shurimpuhabu) になります。

Translate to Japanese (include romanization)

"Official Japanese translation"
公式の日本語訳 (Kōshiki no Nihongo yaku)

Translate to Japanese (include romanization)

"I thought the computer was supposed to be good at racing."
コンピューターはレーシングが得意だと思っていたのに。 (Konpyūtā wa rēshingu ga tokui da to omotte ita noni.)
